ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event (in miles or kilometers) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event takes place */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, active, completed, cancelled) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "distance_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distance type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_distance_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_type_id") REFERENCES distance_types ("distance_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the event */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the participant's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team is active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "bib_number" INTEGER /* Bib number assigned to the participant */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's registration (e.g., registered, completed, dropped) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant started the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant finished the event */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is active in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the participant to complete the event */,
  "mph" REAL /* Average speed of the participant (in miles per hour) */,
  "fph" INTEGER /* Average pace of the participant (in feet per hour) */,
  "percent_median" REAL /* Percentile rank of the participant's time compared to the median time */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant started the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant finished the event */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by the participant */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Total elevation gain during the event */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate of the participant during the event */,
  "cadence" INTEGER /* Average cadence (pedal revolutions per minute) of the participant during the event */,
  "power_output" INTEGER /* Average power output (watts) of the participant during the event */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the performance metrics are valid (e.g., not disqualified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_types" (
  "distance_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance type */,
  "distance_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the distance type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distance type */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the distance type (e.g., mi, km) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bib_numbers" (
  "bib_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bib number */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "bib_number" INTEGER /* Bib number assigned to the participant */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bib number is active */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the bib number was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bib_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bib_numbers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bib_numbers_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentile_ranks" (
  "percentile_rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentile rank */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "percentile_rank" REAL /* Percentile rank of the participant's time compared to the median time */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the percentile rank is valid (e.g., not disqualified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentile_rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentile_ranks_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentile_ranks_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pace" (
  "pace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pace */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "pace" INTEGER /* Average pace of the participant (in feet per hour) */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the pace is valid (e.g., not disqualified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pace_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pace_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speed" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the participant (in miles per hour) */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the speed is valid (e.g., not disqualified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speed_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speed_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
